author: gb9t
content:
Inputs already on disk:
- /home/doll/grsec-6.6.102.patch (14 MB, 4808 files, against linux-6.6.102)
- .design/references/grsec-pax-notes.md (catalog + Rust translation principle)
- Knowledge page 'grsec-pax-notes' (tags: reference, security, backlog)

Authoring prerequisites (Q6 in 00-overview.md):
- Phase A complete (rust-conventions + glossary + index written)
- mm/00-overview.md exists (so we can reference real allocator/paging structures)
- arch/x86/00-overview.md exists (so we can reference real entry/IDT/CPU code paths)

Doc deliverable shape:
- Foundational tier (sits next to 00-overview.md as 00-security-principles.md)
- Three buckets per the catalog: 'free in Rust', 'type-system encodable', 'explicit per-subsystem policy'
- Compat policy: off-by-default Kconfig gating for any userspace-visible change; on-by-default for invisible hardening
- Cross-references the future per-subsystem 'Hardening' section that all tier-2/3 docs will adopt

Block on issue #1 — this issue depends on Phase A completion.
